plan.objective: DECOMPOSE (not discharge) kotecky_preiss_criterion_Surface for the real integral operator T_L

attestation.note: This file is an external record of a decomposition/enumeration plan. It is not a proof, discharges no surface, and modifies no locked invariant.

honesty_locks.hw1_constraint_source: CERT_Arb_beta0_enclosure (VERIFIED_OUT_OF_TOWER); β₀ certified in [2.079416880123, 2.079416880124] under repo action S=(3-Re tr U)/3
honesty_locks.note: This plan ENUMERATES requirements only. Every leaf input is either genuine open combinatorics/analysis or OUT-OF-TOWER (absent from mathlib v4.12.0). It proves nothing, closes no surface, and asserts no gap.

target_surface.name: kotecky_preiss_criterion_Surface
target_surface.statement: ∃ β₀:ℝ, 0<β₀ ∧ ∀ β:ℝ, β₀<β → ∃ gap:ℝ, 0<gap ∧ ∀ (L:ℕ) (f:Lp ℝ 2 (haarN (4*L^4))), (∫ U, f U ∂(haarN (4*L^4)) = 0) → ‖T_L L β f‖ ≤ Real.exp (-(β*gap)) * ‖f‖
target_surface.non_vacuous_reason: exp(-(β*gap))<1 for gap>0,β>0, so the bound is STRICTLY stronger than the proven ‖T_L‖≤1 (transfer_operator_norm_le); not implied by existing facts.
target_surface.scope: uniform-in-L, FIXED-β LATTICE spectral gap on vacuum-orthogonal sector
target_surface.NOT_in_scope: continuum limit, lattice-spacing->0, OS reconstruction, Clay continuum mass gap

already_proven_trio_clean.name: polymerActivity_tendsto_zero_of_null (DCT reduction, CONDITIONAL on null hyp)

D3_kp_summability.derivation: follows from D1+D2: Cⁿ entropy beaten by ε^{α·n} small-energy gain for β large-but-finite

D4_w1_strict_bound.statement: w1 := ∫_{SU(3)} exp(-β·S) d haarSU3 ;  w1 < 1/7  for β > β₀≈2.07942  (under repo action S=(3-Re tr U)/3)

tested_2026_06_01.method: Weyl-torus quadrature + 2e6-draw MC validation (numerical, NOT Arb/MPFI, NOT Lean)
tested_2026_06_01.stale_threshold_corrected: the earlier β>~0.85 was for the UN-normalized action 3-Re tr; repo uses /3-normalized S ⟹ threshold ~3x

certified_2026_06_01.method: rigorous interval enclosure (mpmath.iv, N=36, tail ≤ 4.46e-32, exact rational SU(3) moments)

D4_w1_strict_bound.needs: SU(3) character theory OR verified interval cubature (Arb/MPFI) to certify β₀ rigorously — see CERT_Arb plan draft

D6_kp_implies_decay.statement: KP-summability ⟹ geometric two-point clustering ρ<1 ⟹ ‖T_L f‖≤exp(-β·gap)‖f‖ on {∫f=0}

scope_1_dependencies.reduction_chain: D4 ⟹ D5 ⟹ (D1+D2 ⟹ D3, KP-summable) ⟹ D6 ⟹ target. Valid ONLY if all of D1..D6 hold; NONE discharged or scheduled.

branch_warning.basis: Transfer.lean:569-578 — even full polymerActivity_tendsto_zero is a SINGLE polymer's β→∞ limit; KP needs a UNIFORM SUM at finite β₀. Closing trivial_polymer_set_null does NOT close KP.

scope_2_polymer_counting_lemma.role: SOLE stated upstream dependency of the criterion; the Clay-grade open content (Surface #1)
scope_2_polymer_counting_lemma.attempt_directive_in_source: do NOT attempt without the counting estimate

surface_def.name: trivial_polymer_set_null_Surface
surface_def.statement: (L:ℕ) [NeZero L] (γ : Finset (Lattice 4 L × Fin 4 × Fin 4)) : Prop := haarN (4*L^4) {w | polymerEnergy (toGauge L w) γ = 0} = 0

scope_3_trivial_polymer_set_null.sufficiency_note: NoAtoms kills only COUNTABLE sets; the trivial set is an UNCOUNTABLE positive-codim subvariety ⟹ NoAtoms alone insufficient, see scope_4.

scope_4_proof_sketch_null_set.goal: haarN-nullity of {w | polymerEnergy(toGauge w)γ = 0} for γ≠∅

case_L_ge_2.argument: fix all links but one; plaquette-triviality forces the remaining link to a single point ⟹ null fibre ⟹ product null
case_L_ge_2.caveat: naive 'codimension 8·|γ|' count is LATTICE-SIZE dependent; clean only when the |γ| plaquette links are distinct freely-varying coordinates

case_L_eq_1.degeneracy: a plaquette degenerates to a commutator [g,h]
case_L_eq_1.method: centralizer-codimension / regular-element analysis (NOT the marginal argument)
case_L_eq_1.reason: the four plaquette links are NOT four distinct freely-varying coordinates
case_L_eq_1.difficulty: harder; needs regular-element measure estimate for SU(3)

termination.conclusion: The criterion reduces cleanly to D1..D6, but EVERY leaf is open research or OUT-OF-TOWER. No leaf is dischargeable in mathlib v4.12.0 today. Surface #1 and the YM tower stay OPEN; no mass-gap / m>0 / Clay claim is made.
